profile.name: Sumit Bansiya
profile.title: AI Maven | Researcher | Mentor
profile.bio: AI Researcher, M.Tech Scholar, and Educator specializing in Computer Vision, Generative AI, and Medical Imaging. Passionate about developing high-fidelity models (GANs), optimizing deep learning pipelines, and delivering hands-on AI education to build socially impactful healthcare solutions.

achievements.title: IndiaAI Fellow
achievements.description: Selected for the prestigious IndiaAI Fellowship under the IndiaAI Mission, Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY), Government of India, in recognition of AI research excellence.

about.summary: I'm an AI Researcher and M.Tech scholar working at the intersection of computer vision and generative modeling, currently focused on making breast-cancer screening safer through synthetic medical imaging. Outside research, I build production-grade LLM systems — RAG pipelines, agentic workflows, and inference services — and spend a good chunk of my time teaching the next batch of ML engineers.

education.detail: CGPA: 8.43 — Focus: Medical Imaging, Deep Learning Research

experience.description: Optimizing prompt strategies for LLMs to enhance reasoning in complex analytical and coding tasks.
experience.impact: Conducting RLHF evaluations for factual accuracy and safety; refined mathematical reasoning chains for higher-fidelity multi-step problem solving.

experience.description: Delivered intensive offline training in Python, ML, DL, and CNNs, emphasizing hands-on coding and industry workflows.
experience.impact: Mentored students for internships and academic projects; ran AI awareness sessions in government schools for non-technical students.
